criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience and functionality.

criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user rating of the app on app stores.

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.

criteria.name: Feature Richness
criteria.description: The variety and usefulness of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and engagement within the app.
